jsonld.name: Charitable Blindness
jsonld.description: The specific risk created by RLHF-trained good-faith assumptions when genuine malevolence signals are present—the point at which the trained reflex toward charitable interpretation transitions from appropriate generosity into something closer to willful ignorance.
